qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT liq19.oi_liquidacion as ID, liq19.c_liquidacion as CODE, liq19.d_titulo as TEXT, liq19.oi_empresa as PID FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as liq19 WHERE liq19.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} and liq19.c_estado=\'I\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT org03.oi_empresa as ID, org03.c_empresa as CODE, org03.d_empresa as TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03 WHERE org03.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT org03.oi_empresa as ID, org03.c_empresa as CODE, org03.d_empresa as TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03 WHERE org03.c_empresa={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select n.policy from NMD_SECURITY as n where n.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\' and n.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT liq19.oi_liquidacion as ID, liq19.c_liquidacion as CODE, liq19.d_titulo as TEXT FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as liq19 WHERE liq19.c_liquidacion={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND liq19.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} and liq19.c_estado=\'I\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_LIQUIDACION
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select n.policy from NMD_SECURITY as n where n.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' and n.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT org03.oi_empresa as ID, org03.c_empresa as CODE, org03.d_empresa as TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03 WHERE org03.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT liq19.oi_liquidacion as ID, liq19.c_liquidacion as CODE, liq19.d_titulo as TEXT FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as liq19 WHERE liq19.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} and liq19.c_estado=\'I\'')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_LIQUIDACION
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select n.policy from NMD_SECURITY as n where n.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' and n.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQl(' SELECT org03.oi_empresa as ID, org03.c_empresa as CODE, org03.d_empresa as TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03 WHERE org03.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select liq19.oi_empresa from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as liq19 where liq19.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@ID} and liq19.c_estado=\'I\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT liq19.oi_liquidacion as ID, liq19.c_liquidacion as CODE, liq19.d_titulo as TEXT FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as liq19 WHERE liq19.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} and liq19.c_estado=\'I\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_LIQUIDACION
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select n.policy from NMD_SECURITY as n where n.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' and n.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW
